BaselinePriceBook.description: Container for baseline unit-price entries. Monetary values on entries are always EUR and net (VAT excluded; schema invariant). Labor on entries is hours only; labor money lives on RegionalBenchmark.

anchor_region.description: Region code where material_factor and labor_factor are 1.0 (for example DE_MU).

carbon_source.description: Human-readable name of the carbon reference database.

carbon_source_version.description: Version of the carbon reference database (for example 8.02).

entries.description: Baseline unit-price entries keyed by product notation.

issued.description: Publication date of this dataset edition.

license.description: License URI for the dataset (CC BY 4.0 for benchmark data).

source.description: Path or URI of the editorial source workbook.

BaselinePriceBook.title: BaselinePriceBook

CarbonComponent.description: One layer or row contributing to a layer_recipe_sum carbon total.

gwp_kg_co2eq.description: Global warming potential in kg CO2eq per price unit.

notation.description: SKOS notation of a layer component product.

quantity_per_price_unit.description: Layer quantity per one parent price unit.

CarbonComponent.title: CarbonComponent

CarbonEstimate.description: Generated embodied-carbon estimate per price unit (optional output). Unit-conversion geometry is stored in typed slots — not in assumptions. density_kg_m3 for method density; mass_per_area_kg_m2 for area_yield; area_per_piece_m2 for piece_area. Optional thickness_m documents derived mass_per_area when thickness × density was used.

area_per_piece_m2.description: Area per piece (m²/pcs) used when method is piece_area (price pcs, KBOB m²).

assumptions.description: Human-readable notes only (for example layer_recipe quantity_basis). Not used for unit conversion.

components.description: Layer components for layer_recipe_sum carbon totals.

density_kg_m3.description: Material density (kg/m³) used when method is density (price m³, KBOB kg).

gwp_kg_co2eq.description: Global warming potential in kg CO2eq per price unit.

mass_per_area_kg_m2.description: Mass per m² (kg/m²) used when method is area_yield (price m², KBOB kg).

thickness_m.description: Optional layer thickness (m) when mass_per_area_kg_m2 was derived as thickness_m × density_kg_m3.

CarbonEstimate.title: CarbonEstimate

CurrencyEnum.description: ISO 4217 currency for regional labor rates. Price-book material is always EUR.
CurrencyEnum.title: CurrencyEnum

DemolitionCost.description: Disassembly/demolition labor and disposal per price unit (EUR, net, VAT excluded).

disposal_cost.description: Disposal cost per price unit in EUR (net, VAT excluded).

hours_per_unit.description: Demolition labor hours per price unit.

DemolitionCost.title: DemolitionCost

KbobCarbonReference.description: Reference to KBOB ecobilans benchmark concept IRIs. Indicator values are resolved from kbob-ecobilans-lca-factors.json, not stored here.

benchmark_uris.description: KBOB ecobilans concept IRIs for carbon lookup.

carbon_method.description: Method used to normalize carbon to the price unit.

primary_match_type.description: SKOS mapping match type used for the primary carbon reference.

KbobCarbonReference.title: KbobCarbonReference

PriceObservation.description: One contributed or reference value for a canonical UnitPriceEntry slot. Observations support multi-party authoring and audit; they do not replace the canonical scalar fields on the parent entry.

aspect.description: Canonical slot this observation applies to.

contributed_at.description: Date the observation was recorded or published.

contributor.description: Person or team that supplied the observation (optional display name or id).

provenance_status.description: How the unit-price point estimate was sourced and validated.

reference_source.description: Reference dataset, organisation, or document identifier.

selects_canonical.description: When true, marks this observation as the chosen source for the parent entry's canonical value for the given aspect.

value.description: Observed numeric value in the same unit as the parent aspect.

PriceObservation.title: PriceObservation

PriceObservationAspectEnum.description: Which canonical UnitPriceEntry slot an observation records. Monetary aspects are EUR net (VAT excluded); labor aspects are person-hours per price_unit; waste_pct and transport_pct are fractions (0–1).
PriceObservationAspectEnum.title: PriceObservationAspectEnum

PriceUncertainty.description: Relative uncertainty band around point material cost and labor hours. Percent slots are signed fractions relative to the point estimate (for example material_low_pct -0.12 → low = point × 0.88). Derived EUR and hour bounds are optional generator output for convenience.

labor_high_pct.description: Upper labor bound as signed fraction of labor hours (≥ 0).

labor_low_pct.description: Lower labor bound as signed fraction of labor hours (≤ 0).

material_cost_high.description: Derived upper material_cost in EUR (net, VAT excluded).

material_cost_low.description: Derived lower material_cost in EUR (net, VAT excluded).

material_high_pct.description: Upper material bound as signed fraction of material_cost (≥ 0).

material_low_pct.description: Lower material bound as signed fraction of material_cost (≤ 0).

offsite_labor_hours_high.description: Derived upper offsite labor hours per price unit.

offsite_labor_hours_low.description: Derived lower offsite labor hours per price unit.

onsite_labor_hours_high.description: Derived upper onsite labor hours per price unit.

onsite_labor_hours_low.description: Derived lower onsite labor hours per price unit.

PriceUncertainty.title: PriceUncertainty

PriceUnitEnum.description: Native trade unit for a baseline unit price.
PriceUnitEnum.title: PriceUnitEnum

ProvenanceStatusEnum.description: How the unit-price point estimate was sourced and validated.
ProvenanceStatusEnum.title: ProvenanceStatusEnum

RegionalBenchmark.description: Material and labor factors for one region.

currency.description: Local currency for labor rates and installed-cost total.

fx_to_eur.description: Material FX only. Multiply local currency → EUR (for example 1 CHF × 0.95). EUR book → local uses delivered_eur / fx_to_eur.

labor_unit_price.description: Onsite installation labor rate per hour in currency (net, VAT excluded).

material_factor.description: Regional material price level vs anchor region (DE_MU = 1.0).

offsite_labor_unit_price.description: Factory/offsite labor rate per hour in currency (net, VAT excluded).

RegionalBenchmark.title: RegionalBenchmark

RegionalBenchmark__identifier_optional.description: Material and labor factors for one region.

currency.description: Local currency for labor rates and installed-cost total.

fx_to_eur.description: Material FX only. Multiply local currency → EUR (for example 1 CHF × 0.95). EUR book → local uses delivered_eur / fx_to_eur.

labor_unit_price.description: Onsite installation labor rate per hour in currency (net, VAT excluded).

material_factor.description: Regional material price level vs anchor region (DE_MU = 1.0).

offsite_labor_unit_price.description: Factory/offsite labor rate per hour in currency (net, VAT excluded).

RegionalBenchmark__identifier_optional.title: RegionalBenchmark

RegionalCostBenchmarkBook.description: Regional material and labor benchmarks paired with a BaselinePriceBook. Installed cost in regional currency uses fx_to_eur for material EUR→local and labor_unit_price in local currency. All monetary rates are net (VAT excluded).

anchor_region.description: Region code where material_factor and labor_factor are 1.0 (for example DE_MU).

issued.description: Publication date of this dataset edition.

license.description: License URI for the dataset (CC BY 4.0 for benchmark data).

regions.description: Regional benchmarks keyed by region code.

source.description: Path or URI of the editorial source workbook.

RegionalCostBenchmarkBook.title: RegionalCostBenchmarkBook

UnitPriceEntry.description: One baseline unit price for one abstract SKOS product concept. All monetary amounts are net (VAT excluded). Canonical scalar slots (material_cost, labor hours, etc.) are the resolved benchmark used for installed-cost calculation; optional observations record contributor inputs and reference sources used to derive or challenge those canonical values.

delivered_material_cost.description: Derived delivered material cost in EUR (material_cost × (1 + waste_pct) × (1 + transport_pct)). Net, VAT excluded. Optional in authored input.

kbob.description: KBOB ecobilans carbon reference for this product.

material_cost.description: Ex-works material cost per price_unit in EUR (net, VAT excluded).

observations.description: Optional contributor or reference observations for canonical slot values. Parent entry scalars remain the resolved benchmark for costing.

offsite_labor_hours_per_unit.description: Factory/offsite labor in person-hours per price_unit.

onsite_labor_hours_per_unit.description: Onsite installation labor in person-hours per price_unit.

price_unit.description: Quantity unit the material cost refers to.

product.description: Abstract product SKOS notation (for example WICP-WOOD). Foreign key into classification vocabularies.

product_uri.description: Derived SKOS concept IRI for the product notation.

provenance_status.description: How the unit-price point estimate was sourced and validated.

transport_pct.description: Transport-to-site (A4) allowance as a fraction of material cost (0–1).

uncertainty.description: Relative uncertainty band for material cost and labor hours. Derived low/high amounts are computed from point estimates at generation time.

waste_pct.description: Waste allowance as a fraction of material cost (0–1).

UnitPriceEntry.title: UnitPriceEntry

UnitPriceEntry__identifier_optional.description: One baseline unit price for one abstract SKOS product concept. All monetary amounts are net (VAT excluded). Canonical scalar slots (material_cost, labor hours, etc.) are the resolved benchmark used for installed-cost calculation; optional observations record contributor inputs and reference sources used to derive or challenge those canonical values.

delivered_material_cost.description: Derived delivered material cost in EUR (material_cost × (1 + waste_pct) × (1 + transport_pct)). Net, VAT excluded. Optional in authored input.

kbob.description: KBOB ecobilans carbon reference for this product.

material_cost.description: Ex-works material cost per price_unit in EUR (net, VAT excluded).

observations.description: Optional contributor or reference observations for canonical slot values. Parent entry scalars remain the resolved benchmark for costing.

offsite_labor_hours_per_unit.description: Factory/offsite labor in person-hours per price_unit.

onsite_labor_hours_per_unit.description: Onsite installation labor in person-hours per price_unit.

price_unit.description: Quantity unit the material cost refers to.

product.description: Abstract product SKOS notation (for example WICP-WOOD). Foreign key into classification vocabularies.

product_uri.description: Derived SKOS concept IRI for the product notation.

provenance_status.description: How the unit-price point estimate was sourced and validated.

transport_pct.description: Transport-to-site (A4) allowance as a fraction of material cost (0–1).

uncertainty.description: Relative uncertainty band for material cost and labor hours. Derived low/high amounts are computed from point estimates at generation time.

waste_pct.description: Waste allowance as a fraction of material cost (0–1).

UnitPriceEntry__identifier_optional.title: UnitPriceEntry

description: Container for baseline unit-price entries. Monetary values on entries are always EUR and net (VAT excluded; schema invariant). Labor on entries is hours only; labor money lives on RegionalBenchmark.

anchor_region.description: Region code where material_factor and labor_factor are 1.0 (for example DE_MU).

carbon_source.description: Human-readable name of the carbon reference database.

carbon_source_version.description: Version of the carbon reference database (for example 8.02).

entries.description: Baseline unit-price entries keyed by product notation.

issued.description: Publication date of this dataset edition.

license.description: License URI for the dataset (CC BY 4.0 for benchmark data).

source.description: Path or URI of the editorial source workbook.

title: baseline_cost_schema
